feed.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

entry.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Room W17 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 17, 06:00 - 14:00 UTC

May 12, 20:36 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 17/06/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 17/06/2026 14:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in the specified racks listed below may experience temporary IPMI unavailability during the operation, for a period of five minutes per rack.
W17A01, W17A02, W17A03, W17B01, W17B02, W17B03, W17A04, W17A05, W17A06, W17B04, W17B05, W17B06, W17A07, W17A08, W17A09, W17B07, W17B08, W17B09, W17A10, W17A11, W17A12, W17B10, W17B11, W17B12, W17A13, W17A14, W17A15, W17B13, W17B14, W17B15, W17A16, W17A17, W17A18, W17B16, W17B17, W17B18 , W17A19, W17A20, W17A21, W17B19, W17B20 and W17B21.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [SYD2][Dedicated Servers] - Multiple racks maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 3, 21:00 UTC  -  Jun 4, 07:00 UTC

May 13, 20:06 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 03/06/2026 21:00 UTC
End time : 04/06/2026 07:00 UTC
Service impact : Public network and IPMI will be unavailable during maintenance for servers located in the specified racks:  S2-5X-02-06A, S2-5X-02-07A, S2-5X-02-07B, S2-5X-02-08A, S2-5X-02-09A, S2-5X-02-10B, S2-5X-02-11A and S2-5X-02-11B.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [WAW][Dedicated Servers] - Room WAW0106/WAW0107 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 2, 17:30 - 20:30 UTC

May 18, 15:05 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offering, affecting servers in racks listed below :
- Rack WAW0106A02C
- Rack WAW0106A05C
- Rack WAW0106B02C
- Rack WAW0107A05C

Start time : 02/06/2026 17:30 UTC
End time : 02/06/2026 20:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our network infrastructure, we will be upgrading multiple network devices to enhance security and reliability.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [WAW1][Network] - Network equipment maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 28, 12:30 - 15:30 UTC

May 13, 20:02 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our network infrastructure.

Start time : 28/05/2026 12:30 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 15:30 UTC
Service impact : Customers who have not configured the LACP service may temporarily experience a service interruption.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will have to carry out interventions on multiple network equipment.

List of concerned Racks :
- Rack WAW0118A01B
- Rack WAW0118A01C
- Rack WAW0118A04A
- Rack WAW0118B04B
- Rack WAW0118A04B

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L121B09 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 28, 07:00 - 09:00 UTC

Apr 30, 22:20 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 28/05/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 09:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [SBG3][Dedicated Servers] - Rack S333B07 maintenance notification
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 28, 02:00 - 03:00 UTC

May 12, 20:17 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack S333B07.

Start time : 28/05/2026 02:00 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 03:00 UTC
Service impact : Public and vRack networks will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance for servers in S333B07 which doesn't have LACP activated.
However, if LACP is activated, bandwidth perturbation will be observed on Public and vRack networks for servers in S333B07.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L121B02 incident notification
entry.content:
May 21, 04:55 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 21/05/2026 04:45 UTC
End time : 21/05/2026 04:53 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 21, 04:49 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack L121B02.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 21/05/2026 04:45 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the rack L121B02 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

entry.title: [RBX8][Dedicated Servers] - Rack R806L10 incident notification
entry.content:
May 20, 14:29 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Dedicated Servers offer on rack R806L10 which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 20/05/2026 11:55 UTC
End time : 20/05/2026 12:01 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Servers in rack R806L10 were temporarily unable to access the vRack network.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access their servers via vRack network located on the specified rack.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [SBG5][Cooling System] - Rack SBG0506B02A Maintenance Notification
entry.content:
May 20, 14:24 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 20, 12:27 UTC
Update - The current maintenance will take more time than expected.
Below you can find the new end time of the operation.
End time : 20/05/2026 19:00 UTC

May 20, 08:10 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 20, 08:07 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure in Rack SBG0506B02A.

Start time : 20/05/2026 07:54 UTC
End time : 20/05/2026 15:00 UTC
Service impact : The cooling system's efficiency could be temporarily impacted for some servers, which could cause a decreased performance during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [GRA2][Dedicated Servers] - Rack G201A02 maintenance notification
entry.content:
May 20, 02:11 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

May 20, 02:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 12, 20:10 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer, affecting servers in rack G201A02.

Start time : 20/05/2026 02:00 UTC
End time : 20/05/2026 03:00 UTC
Service impact : Public network will be temporarily unavailable during the maintenance for servers in G201A02.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on a network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS5][Dedicated Servers] - Room T05H/T05G incident notification
entry.content:
May 19, 19:48 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering has been resolved.

Start time : 19/05/2026 18:30 UTC
End time : 19/05/2026 19:45 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 19, 19:36 UTC
Update - Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and final resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 19, 18:41 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Dedicated Servers offering in the room T05H/T05G.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 19/05/2026 18:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : The public network is currently unstable (flapping) or temporarily unavailable on the racks listed below :
T05G09
T05G28
T05G30
T05G34
T05G35
T05G37
T05G39
T05H02
T05H03
T05H04
T05H05
T05H06
T05H07
T05H09
T05H10
T05H11
T05H26
T05H28

Customers Impact : Customers may experience intermittent connectivity issues, packet loss, or latency when accessing their servers through the Public network.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

entry.title: [BHS][Virtual Private Servers] - Network incident notification
entry.content:
May 19, 18:06 UTC
Resolved - We would like to inform you that an incident occurred on our Virtual Private Servers offering.
This incident has now been resolved.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 19/05/2026 17:47 UTC
End time : 19/05/2026 17:55 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some instances in the BHS region were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers were temporarily unable to access and use their instances located on the specified region.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

entry.title: [LIM/RBX][Storage and Backups] - Enterprise File Storage incident notification
entry.content:
May 19, 14:33 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Enterprise File Storage offering has been resolved.

Start time : 19/05/2026 08:00 UTC
End time : 19/05/2026 14:00 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by this maintenance : https://network.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/477q4g38610z

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 19, 14:20 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an incident affecting our Enterprise File Storage offering in the LIM and RBX Regions.
The root cause has been identified.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 19/05/2026 08:00 UTC
Service impact: Enterprise File Storage Service is temporarily unavailable in the specified regions.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their data.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by this maintenance : https://network.status-ovhcloud.com/incidents/477q4g38610z
Ongoing Actions : Our teams are actively working to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.
We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
